summary: Added native Anthropic Messages API support for Claude with streaming, multimodal image input, tool calling, prompt caching, and auth/base_url controls; integrated provider routing and tests.

validation.notes: 9 new Anthropic-native provider and routing tests passed.
Full test suite passed (21 passed, 1 skipped).

notes: Implemented a new native `AnthropicAIProvider` for Claude via Anthropic Messages API and routed `provider="anthropic"` to use it by default, with an optional fallback flag (`use_litellm_anthropic` / `UNIONLLM_USE_LITELLM_ANTHROPIC`) for rollback. The provider now supports non-stream + stream flows, OpenAI-format to Anthropic-format conversion for system/messages/text+image/tools/tool results, stream delta mapping (including tool call deltas and finish reasons), API key precedence (`api_key` over `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`), custom `base_url`, and automatic prompt caching policy with per-request override controls. I validated the implementation with dedicated new tests and the full repository test suite, both passing.
